subject: [PATCH v3 4/7] fuse: don't require /dev/fuse fd to be kept open during mount

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Raised concern about dereferencing file pointer without checking if it's valid, suggesting an additional 'if (!file)' check to prevent potential issues.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: Patch proposes to relax the requirement that /dev/fuse fd be kept open during mount.
